title: Where do humans look when exploring for rewards?
description: An interactive visualization of human eye-tracking behavior during Atari gameplay, examining how visual attention relates to reward events across games with different reward structures (Breakout, Space Invaders, Montezuma’s Revenge).

title: Examining LLM Cognition Through Puzzles and Optical Illusions
description: An investigation into whether large language models exhibit human-like cognitive biases when presented with classic puzzles, checker-shadow illusions, and visual reasoning tasks.

title: Spatio-Temporal Abstractions in Reinforcement Learning
description: Exploring how hierarchical spatio-temporal abstractions can improve sample efficiency and generalization in deep RL agents navigating complex environments.
